utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills is substantially more effective than wo_skills. The wi_skills run invoked the anon-skill-002 skill, which enforced the full 11-section review discipline: it applied SELECTIVE EXPANSION mode explicitly, structured a rigorous core review before separately surfacing individually addressable expansion proposals, named specific partial-failure scenarios, mapped UI edge cases (double-click, navigate-away, multi-tab), analyzed the bulk-discount API contract across payload validation / backward compatibility / rate limiting, identified specific test gaps with recommended test types, named performance hotspots (N+1 queries, WebSocket load), questioned the success metric and proposed alternatives, and identified concrete observability gaps. It also bundled any expansion ideas into a single vague summary paragraph rather than presenting them as distinct opt-in proposals, and produced no CEO REVIEW SUMMARY section.
